name: Tatsumaki | At the Beach.
description:
Tatsumaki is one of the most powerful heroes in the Hero Association, however even her needs a break every once in a while. She takes you, her escort, to the beach for her to get a bit of sunshine. As the day goes on, she wants you to slather some sunscreen on her, will you do as she asks?

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?

Image Source.

Ty to Dawn once more for supplying the sauce.
creator: MonstrousCrow_
